content:
❓ Common Questions About Quebec Innovation

What is the CRIC rate?

Up to 30% refundable tax credit.

Can I stack with SR&ED?

Yes, combined rates can reach 95%.

Is PRIMA funding available?

Yes, for advanced manufacturing R&D.

Who qualifies for IQ?

Most innovative Quebec businesses.

What are the Top Innovation Grants in Quebec?

Quebec R&D Tax Credit (CRIC) - 30% Refundable Tax Credit

  • Quebec-based R&D salaries (30% credit)
  • University research contracts (30% credit)
  • Materials consumed in R&D (30% credit)
  • Private research contracts (14% credit)
  • Up to 30% refundable tax credit
  • Stacks with SR&ED (up to 95% combined)
  • No annual expenditure limit
  • Cash refund for eligible corporations

Investissement Québec - Innovation & Growth Programs

  • Innovation loans and working capital
  • Export financing and guarantees
  • Equity investments and venture capital
  • Technology commercialization support
  • C3i tax credit (innovation project)
  • E-business tax credit
  • Multimedia title tax credit
  • Manufacturing investment tax credit

PRIMA Quebec - Advanced Manufacturing Consortium

  • Aerospace manufacturing innovation
  • Advanced materials and composites
  • Industry 4.0 and smart factories
  • Sustainable manufacturing processes
  • 50/50 cost-share model
  • University-industry partnerships
  • Technology transfer support
  • Commercialization pathways

Quebec Research Consortia & Innovation Centers

  • CRIBIQ - Industrial biotechnology
  • CRITM - Transportation materials
  • PROMPT - Software & IT innovation
  • FPInnovations - Forest products
  • Pre-competitive research funding
  • Technology development support
  • Industry networking and partnerships
  • Student and researcher training

Which Sectors Receive Quebec Innovation Funding?

Aerospace Excellence

Gaming & VFX Leadership

Life Sciences & Biotech

AI & IT Innovation

CleanTech & Hydroelectricity

Advanced Manufacturing

Where are Quebec's Innovation Hubs Located?

Greater Montreal

  • AI & deep learning excellence (Mila)
  • Gaming & VFX capital of North America
  • Aerospace manufacturing cluster
  • Strong venture capital ecosystem

Quebec City & Eastern Quebec

  • Insurance & financial technology
  • Software development & IT services
  • Optics, photonics & lasers
  • Government procurement opportunities

Laval & North Shore

  • Biomanufacturing & pharmaceuticals
  • Medical technology
  • Aerospace supply chain
  • Food processing innovation

Sherbrooke & Eastern Townships

  • Health technology & medical devices
  • Engineering innovation
  • Clean technology development
  • University-industry partnerships

How to Win Quebec Innovation Grants?

shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Quebec innovation grants and tax credits. Access $2.5B+ through 30% Quebec R&D Tax Credit (CRIC), Investissement Québec, PRIMA Quebec, and aerospace, gaming, biotech programs. Funding available: up to $2.5B+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Quebec Innovation Grants & Tax Credits  | 30% CRIC R&D Tax Credit | .5B+ Funding in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Quebec Innovation Grants & Tax Credits  | 30% CRIC R&D Tax Credit | .5B+ Funding?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $2.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Combine Federal & Provincial
expertTip.content: Quebec companies can stack federal SR&ED (15-35%) with Quebec's CRIC (30%), achieving total R&D tax credits of 45-65%—the highest in North America.
